description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-sectioned roof in shades of terracotta and gray. The front facade is defined by a gated entryway, a covered porch, and a decorative fence, giving it a secure and welcoming appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light peach color, complemented by white-framed windows and a combination of flat and sloped rooflines. The house includes several architectural elements such as overhangs, a carport, and multiple window groupings, suggesting a spacious interior. The property is enclosed by a perimeter fence with ornamental details, enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban elements, making it suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A large, single-story house with a complex terracotta roof, light peach walls, and a gated, fenced front entry. Features include a covered porch, carport, and multiple window groupings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entry, covered porch, decorative fence, and main facade with windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat expanse of the house, perimeter fence, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the multi-sectioned roof, back facade, and additional overhangs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the carport, extended roof, and side fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a covered porch, decorative fencing, and a main door set back under an overhang.
